creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #11)

Other things may be going on for my future
experiments: my script for kldloads for
setting up the tests reports lots of
"invalid traecpoint" messages, both for
kernel-NODEBUG and for kernel (both main).
The below is from kernel (so: debug).
